programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail meet with the team at Advanced Vitality to explore the cutting edge of preventative healthcare. With over 60% of Americans facing accelerated cellular aging, the company is looking to scale fast—and needs the right strategy to do it. Next, Cindy from Scout & Zoe’s joins the conversation to share how her insect-based dog treats are creating buzz in the pet industry. Her clever and down-to-earth grassroots marketing approach (pun intended) is changing the game for alternative protein sources. Finally, Kevin and Toli sit down with leaders from Hammer Haag Steel and Zenith Trek to dive into the challenges and opportunities of building complex, large-scale equipment and structures.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The A-Team gets back to work—this time diving into cross-marketing strategies for Advanced Vitality. Over at Hammer Haag, the team discusses launching a gritty new “Micro Dirty Jobs” miniseries to spotlight American manufacturing in action. We’re also introduced to serial entrepreneur Jeff Kline, founder of 1-800-Medigap, who brings a powerhouse presence to the team’s growing roster. Meanwhile, Cindy from Scout & Zoe’s returns for a full brand overhaul with the experts. Newest A-Team member Rudy Mawer steps in with high-level influencer insight and a mission to empower the next generation of entrepreneurs. And finally, Zenith Trek makes bold moves to break into big box retail—with the A-Team guiding the way.

programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: Ladies and gentlemen, it's time to close the deal on Beyond the Close! Join us for the grand finale and winner celebration episode, where we'll reveal the triumphant super-agent who has risen to the very top of the competition. But that's not all. Get ready to hear firsthand from the contestants themselves as they reflect on their 90-day journey and share their growth, learnings, and future aspirations. It's a night of triumph, tears, and unforgettable moments as we bid farewell to the most thrilling season yet. And as if that wasn't enough, we have a very special guest in store. The one and only Christine Quinn, star of Netflix's Selling Sunset, will be joining us for the festivities. She'll be sharing her insights on the industry and giving us a glimpse into what it takes to be a top realtor. But wait, there's more! We'll be taking you on an exclusive tour of some of Miami's most luxurious properties, hosted by none other than some of America's top developers and agents. So sit back, relax, and get ready to be transported beyond the close.

programme.desc:
Locked On HBCU host Darrion "Mouth of the South" Gray breaks down all of the sports news around the HBCU landscape. Darrion, a Texas Southern alum and former TSU Herald sports editor, is dedicated to giving a fair and in-depth look at all the talent across HBCU sports—not just the big schools like Southern University, Grambling University, and Alabama A&M. It's easy to get updates on Deion Sanders and Jackson State, but this is the only daily podcast breaking it all down across the entirety of HBCUs, from SWAC to MEAC to SIAC, CIAA, GCAC, and those outside of the traditional HBCU conferences like Tennessee State, Hampton, and North Carolina A&T. From the Bayou Classic to the Tuskegee Morehouse Classic and from 0 to the 5th, Locked On HBCU has you covered.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: S1E1 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Join “The Lion Whisperer” Kevin Richardson and a fearless team of conservationists on an epic mission to protect the planet’s most majestic and endangered predators. From rescuing lions at the Kevin Richardson Wildlife Sanctuary in South Africa to safeguarding orangutans and Cape Griffons in the wilds of Indonesia, witness heart-pounding rescues, fierce battles against exploitation, and inspiring stories of survival. This is conservation at its most daring—unmissable, unforgettable, and truly wild.

It’s the ultimate fusion of wildlife wonder and high-octane thrills—you won’t be able to look away.

programme.title: Mclintock! 1963
programme.desc: John Wayne leads the charge in McLintock!, a rip-roaring Western comedy brimming with action, romance, and frontier spirit. As wealthy cattle baron George Washington McLintock tries to keep the peace between feuding homesteaders, rowdy cowhands, and local Native tribes, he also faces his toughest battle yet—his fiery estranged wife (Maureen O’Hara), who’s just returned to town. Filled with slapstick brawls, lively banter, and heartwarming humor, McLintock! delivers classic Western entertainment with larger-than-life charm.

programme.title: The Gambling Terror 1937
programme.desc: In The Gambling Terror, cowboy hero Johnny Mack Brown takes on a ruthless gang that’s bleeding a frontier town dry with crooked gambling and brutal intimidation. Standing tall against the odds, he fights to bring law and order back to the West. Packed with gun-slinging action, high-stakes tension, and a dash of frontier romance, this thrilling Western proves that justice always calls the final hand.

programme.title: Tombstone Canyon

programme.title: Enemy of the Law
programme.desc: To get the money hidden by Gray before he was caught, the Rangers send Perkins to prison to become his friend. When the two get out, Perkins is unaware that Gray has printed the map to the loot on the bottom of his foot.

programme.title: Gunfight at Red Sands 1963
programme.desc: In Gunfight at Red Sands, Richard Harrison rides into a border town torn apart by greed and violence. When ruthless bandits threaten the land and its people, a mysterious gunman takes justice into his own hands. With sweeping desert vistas, tense standoffs, and the first-ever Spaghetti Western score by Ennio Morricone, this action-packed tale blazes with the grit and glory of the frontier.
